heading: Definitions
label: 3192 Definitions
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first full program year after (), see , set out as a note under .July 22, 2014July 1, 2015section 506 of Pub. L. 113–128section 3101 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: that provides information for a Job Corps center on local employment opportunities and the job skills needed to obtain the opportunities; and

children.label: B
children.text: that serves communities in which the graduates of the Job Corps center seek employment.

children.heading: Applicable one-stop center
children.label: 2 Applicable one-stop center
children.text: The term “applicable one-stop center” means a one-stop center that provides services, such as referral, assessment, recruitment, and placement, to support the purposes of the Job Corps.

children.heading: Enrollee
children.label: 3 Enrollee
children.text: The term “enrollee” means an individual who has voluntarily applied for, been selected for, and enrolled in the Job Corps program, and remains with the program, but has not yet become a graduate.

children.heading: Former enrollee
children.label: 4 Former enrollee
children.text: The term “former enrollee” means an individual who has voluntarily applied for, been selected for, and enrolled in the Job Corps program, but left the program prior to becoming a graduate.

children.heading: Graduate
children.label: 5 Graduate
children.text: The term “graduate” means an individual who has voluntarily applied for, been selected for, and enrolled in the Job Corps program and who, as a result of participation in the Job Corps program, has received a secondary school diploma or recognized equivalent, or completed the requirements of a career and technical education and training program that prepares individuals for employment leading to economic self-sufficiency or entrance into postsecondary education or training.

children.heading: Job Corps
children.label: 6 Job Corps
children.text: The term “Job Corps” means the Job Corps described in .section 3193 of this title

children.heading: Job Corps center
children.label: 7 Job Corps center
children.text: The term “Job Corps center” means a center described in .section 3197 of this title

children.heading: Operator
children.label: 8 Operator
children.text: The term “operator” means an entity selected under this part to operate a Job Corps center.

children.heading: Region
children.label: 9 Region
children.text: The term “region” means an area defined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Service provider
children.label: 10 Service provider
children.text: The term “service provider” means an entity selected under this part to provide services described in this part to a Job Corps center.
